title: Actor step
description: The actor agent's entire turn: one thought, one action, one expectation. schema_version 3.
$comment: The canonical VALIDATION contract — the real gate, compiled per driver by forcedToolCall. `action` is a FLAT object: one `type` verb plus the flat parameters that verb uses (NOT a oneOf union). Per-verb required parameters are enforced by the `allOf` if/then block. drivers/overlay.js projects this per driver: stepSchemaFor() scopes the `type` (and `direction`) enum to a driver's verbs and is what validates; toolParamsFor() derives a stripped, model-facing copy (no allOf/additionalProperties/min-max, only the driver's fields). The OpenAI-compat endpoint does NOT constrain decoding, so the shipped schema is documentation and THIS file is enforcement. Verbs — web: click/type/select/scroll/navigate/back/wait/done/give_up; mobile: tap/type/swipe/scroll/back/wait/done/give_up; api: request/wait/done/give_up (wait, done, give_up shared across all drivers; back is web+mobile).

thought.description: Free-form reasoning about the current page and what to do next.

expectation.description: Free-form prediction of what should happen after the action executes.

visual.description: Only when a screenshot was provided: your visual read of the rendered page — what drew the eye first, what competed for attention, and what was missed or hard to find. Omit on text-only turns.

type.description: The single verb to perform this turn.

ref.description: Element ref from the latest snapshot, e.g. "e42" (click/type/select/tap; optional for scroll/swipe).

text.description: Text to type into the element; replaces the current value (type).

value.description: Visible label or value of the option to select (select).

url.description: Absolute URL or path relative to base_url (navigate).

seconds.description: How long to wait, in seconds (wait).

path.description: Request path or URL relative to base_url (request).

body.description: Optional request body — a JSON value for application/json, or a string (request).

summary.description: What was accomplished, in the persona's voice (done).

reason.description: Why the task cannot be completed (give_up).
